## Summary

Describe the RFC or governance change.

## Type

- [ ] New RFC proposal
- [ ] Amendment to existing RFC
- [ ] Process / template improvement
- [ ] Other

## Status

- [ ] Draft
- [ ] Under review
- [ ] Accepted
- [ ] Other

## Validation

How did you verify the proposal? (e.g., reviewed compatibility impact, consulted affected spec sections)

## Related Issues / RFCs

Link any related issues, prior discussions, or protocol specs.
